design_philosophy: A warm, accessible, and intuitive interface designed for elderly care. Prioritizes large touch targets, highly readable typography, and a calming 'pastel earthy' palette to reduce cognitive load and build trust.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Avoid clutter. Everything should be easily tappable by users with limited dexterity.
layout_and_spacing.touch_targets: Minimum 56px height (h-14) for all buttons and inputs. 24px icon sizes.
layout_and_spacing.radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for cards/buttons to feel friendly and soft.

components.button_primary: h-16 w-full rounded-2xl bg-[#E07A5F] text-white font-bold text-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-3
components.bento_action_card: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-[#E3DDCF] bg-white transition-all active:scale-95
components.card: bg-white p-6 rounded-3xl shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(61,64,91,0.05)] border border-[#E3DDCF]
components.input: w-full h-14 bg-[#F7F5F0] border-none rounded-xl px-4 text-lg text-[#3D405B] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E07A5F]
components.table_alternative_list: space-y-4 instead of dense tables. Each record is a clear, padded card showing Date, Time, and Value.
components.tab_bar: fixed bottom-0 w-full h-20 bg-white border-t border-[#E3DDCF] flex justify-around items-center px-4 z-50 rounded-t-3xl shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgba(61,64,91,0.05)]

avatar.description: Smiling elderly woman portrait for the patient profile

Home.layout: Top section: Patient Avatar and Name. Middle section: 3 Massive Bento Grid buttons for Insulina (Terracotta), Alimentação (Sage), and Água (Soft Blue). Bottom section: Quick summary/stats and 'Export PDF' button.

Insulin_Screen.layout: Sticky header with back button. Input form: Date/Time picker, Glucose level input, Fast Insulin Units (optional). Below: List of today's records as distinct cards, avoiding tiny spreadsheet tables.

Food_Screen.layout: Categorized by meal: Café, Lanche, Almoço, Lanche da Tarde, Janta, Ceia. Each meal has a card with a status selector (Comeu tudo, Comeu metade, Não comeu) using visual pill buttons. Optional Notes text area.

Water_Screen.layout: Large circular progress or simple big input for ML added. Below: List of timestamps and ml consumed today. Optional notes field.

Stats_Screen.layout: Recharts used to show simple bar charts for weekly water intake, and line charts for glucose levels. Must be color-blind friendly and use large labels.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text colors against pastel backgrounds must be tested. Use #3D405B for text inside pastel buttons if white fails contrast.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case representing their role (e.g., data-testid='add-insulin-button').
accessibility_and_testing.interactions: Provide immediate visual feedback for all taps (opacity change, scale down).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard pure HTML/Tailwind for the bento grid buttons on the Home screen to achieve the customized look.

Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactive logic (forms, selects, dialogs) but heavily override their styles to match the rounded-2xl, soft, borderless aesthetic. Remove standard Vercel-like sharp edges.
Do not build raw <table> tags. Instead, build a 'List' component where each row is a soft card. This is critical for mobile viewability.
Ensure all text sizes are base text-lg minimum. Avoid text-xs entirely.
Export to PDF can use standard print-to-pdf logic or a library like jspdf. Local notifications logic should be stubbed out with toast notifications for the web version if running in browser.
